<!-- Welcome! This issue type exists so nobody gets stuck on "where do
I start?". Answer in a sentence or two each — then we (and eventually
Divina) will suggest a first mission that fits you. -->

## What do you enjoy doing?

<!-- Writing, research, talking to people, design, coding, translating
— anything. -->

## Roughly how much time do you have?

<!-- "An hour this week" is a great answer. -->

## Anything you want to learn?

<!-- e.g. agentic AI tools, open-source collaboration, interviewing... -->
